name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I hope I can call her Madam President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
We can't stop fighting. | Friend --

Five years ago this month, a man stood three feet away from me in a grocery store parking lot, aimed a gun at my head, and pulled the trigger. I survived, but he killed six people that day, including a 9-year-old girl.

Speaking is still physically difficult for me. I do hours and hours of speech therapy. But next January, I hope to call my friend Hillary 'Madam President.'

Mark and I are proud to have Hillary’s back, and to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with her to break the stranglehold the corporate gun lobby has had on American politics -- and American families -- for too long. **If you’re with us, add your name right now, and let’s show the gun lobby that we’re ready for this fight:**

Thank you,

Gabby Giffords

Not only have they succeeded -- for the first time ever -- in pushing their toxic repeal bill through BOTH the House and the Senate to the President's desk, **but if Speaker Ryan 's vote to override the President's veto succeeds, Obamacare -- together with Planned Parenthood's funding -- could be gone forever.**

We've had enough. The American people deserve better.

CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

Friend, tonight, Barack Obama will use his State of the Union
address to help elect Hillary Clinton the next President of the
United States.

Friend,

Tonight, Barack Obama will use his State of the Union address to
help elect Hillary Clinton the next President of the United
States.

With over 30 million people watching, Hillary will be counting on
President Obama to give her campaign a much needed boost -- I
have no doubt Obama will be in Hillary's corner.

With Hillary getting a huge boost from Barack Obama tonight, I'm
asking my supporters to help boost my campaign with a special
State of the Union Money Bomb in the next 24 hours.

Will you make a one-time, special State of the Union Money Bomb
contribution to my campaign tonight?

Even the liberal media is asking the question: "How will Barack
Obama use the speech to help Hillary's campaign..."

President Obama is expected to outline Hillary's first term
agenda tonight, including:

***
Climate Change: Immediate job killing, regulatory action to
address the global warming hysteria.

***
Heavy Gun Control: The first steps to gun registration and
confiscation.

***
Amnesty: Open borders and amnesty for those who have broken
our laws.

Friend, while Hillary will be depending on Barack Obama tonight
to give her campaign a much needed boost...I'm going to depend on
you.

Click here to make your one-time, special State of the Union
Money Bomb gift -- help give my campaign a boost in the next 24
hours.

Friend, I'm asking if you will make a one-time donation of at
least $3 to my campaign.

With your help, I will send a strong message to President Obama,
Hillary, and the liberal media that this is not only Barack
Obama's last term but also the end of Hillary's political career.

I need your help in the next 24 hours.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

name: Rick Tyler
subject: #CruzCrew Daily Briefing
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Dear Friend,

Yesterday, Louisianans rallied with Ted Cruz for a stronger,
safer, and infinitely more free America. The Cruz campaign has
built a powerful ground game not just in the first four primary
states, but in all 24 states that vote before March 15, including
the Super Tuesday states. It's another signal that conservatives
are inspired by the opportunity to coalesce behind a candidate
who speaks the truth, who does what he says, and who will be a
voice for the people.

And today, as
President Obama gives his final State of the Union address, it is
a reminder that in just a few weeks, we have the choice to vote
for a change of course -- one that would stop stifling job
creation and growth, and would instead allow for the creation of
millions of new jobs; one that would end the assault on
Americans' rights and champion citizens' God-given liberties; and
one that no longer appeases our enemies but stands up to
terrorists and defeats them. That's the kind of change that a
President Cruz will bring, and if conservatives unite, it's the
kind of change that will once again give Americans a reason to
believe in the promise of America.

Best,

Rick Tyler
Communications
Director

name: Doug Stafford
subject: FWD: We deserve to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Patriot -
The day is finally here.
Today Rand is voting on Audit the Fed
legislation we've been working on for years.
I'm not sure if you saw Rand's email
yesterday, but he explains perfectly why this day is so
important. You should give it a look!
Americans deserve to know what the Federal
Reserve is hiding. Don't you think?

Please keep an eye out for today's vote, and
if you can, contribute today to show you #StandWithRand to Audit
the Fed!

In Liberty,

Doug Stafford

---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Rand Paul <info@randpaul2016.com>
Date: Mon, Jan 11, 2016 at 1:41 PM
Subject: We deserve to know
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Dear Patriot,

Tomorrow is the day.
Congress is scheduled to vote on the "Audit
the Fed" legislation, which, if passed, would bring an end to the
Federal Reserve's unchecked-and even arguably
unconstitutional-power in the financial markets and the economy.
We aren't the first to be wary of the powers
of central banks. Founding Father Thomas Jefferson viewed the
powers of central banks as being contrary to the protections of
the Constitution. As Jefferson wrote: "I sincerely believe that
banking establishments are more dangerous than standing armies;
and that the principle of spending money to be paid by posterity,
under the name of funding, is but swindling futurity on a large
scale."
But my, how far we have come.
Perhaps we have all been blinded by the
credit and equity bubbles that surround us. But what better
wake-up call to rally support for legislation that would shine a
bright light on the government institution that today has created
these bubbles, subsidizes small subsets of the population (thus
amplifying wealth inequality), and enables endless government
debt?

In preparation of tomorrow's vote I could use
all the support I can get. Will you stand with me?

Chip in $25 >>

Chip in $50 >>

Chip in $75 >>

Chip in $100 >>

Or donate another
amount >>

The Federal Reserve's dangerous manipulation
of credit and equity markets have created instability that
threatens all of us.

The country needs to understand fully the
extent of the Fed's balance sheet: what it holds and from whom it
was acquired, as well as all of the Fed's other activities and
conceivably even more dangerous shenanigans afoot.
We can't really know what we don't know until
we look.
We owe it to the next generation to take a
long, hard look through a full and independent audit of the Fed.
Stand with me today.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

>> DONATE TODAY! >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

subject: This is our government's most important task:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---

---

Peter,

Our government's single, most important task is to keep Americans safe.

I believe the Obama Administration has failed to confront the grave threats to our national security and has been content to "lead from behind."

[**It's time for a new direction, and today I'm proud to announce my foreign policy plan.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32828936:sRJL8tyZN:m:1:876315805:D12C6247A345522A58351F02EA6FDD9C:r)

A Carson Administration will lead from the front, promote peace and prosperity through the power of "We the People," and restore America's role as the world's preeminent leader by enforcing 6 key principles:
* Rearming the military
* Revitalizing critical alliances
* Restoring U.S. global leadership
* Renewing the national security establishment
* Reevaluating when to put American troops in harm's way
* Reviving economic prosperity

[**Please take one minute to hear more directly from me, and then make a secure online donation to support my campaign and my vision for a stronger, safer America.

**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32828936:sRJL8tyZN:m:1:876315805:D12C6247A345522A58351F02EA6FDD9C:r)[**For $25 or more, we'll even send you a copy of my short, easy-to-read book,_My Life_.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32828936:sRJL8tyZN:m:1:876315805:D12C6247A345522A58351F02EA6FDD9C:r)

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32828936:sRJL8tyZN:m:1:876315805:D12C6247A345522A58351F02EA6FDD9C:r)
---

Peter, I believe in the greatness of this country. If we have learned one thing over the last seven years, it is this: the world is a safer place when the United States engages global problems with strength and resolve.

United as one nation, we can defeat any enemy, uphold our values and ensure a safe, peaceful and prosperous America for our children and grandchildren.

Thank you for your time, your patriotism, [and your generous support.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32828936:sRJL8tyZN:m:1:876315805:D12C6247A345522A58351F02EA6FDD9C:r)

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

subject: Before tonight: Sign for President Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:

Friend,

Tonight, President Obama will outline his vision for his last year in office in his final State of the Union address.

While we fight to continue the progress Democrats have made during the President's historic terms, **let 's take a moment to let President Obama know that we're grateful for his hard work for American families.**

[**Join me today: Sign your name to thank President Obama for his leadership and stand with him in his final year in the White House.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3788370719411273728/-5543346201107103744?ms=20160112&refcode=e20160112&refcode2=e20160112&amount=15)

During his seven years in office, President Obama has done so much to move our country forward. Today, millions more Americans have accessible and affordable health care, private sector job growth has risen at the highest rate in recent years, and the United States has emerged as a global leader in the fight to combat the growing threat of climate change.

I'm grateful to have a leader who has constantly put the needs of hardworking Americans first. With a Congress embroiled in gridlock and Republican party leaders in the pockets of special interests, the President has never backed down from a fight for the good of the American people.

**As the President addresses the nation in his final State of the Union, I hope you 'll join me in showing President Obama how grateful we are for his commitment to Democratic values.**

Katie

subject: If they want a fight, they've got one
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Patriot,
We have over 1,000 precinct captains in Iowa
and a huge 500 person leadership team in New Hampshire.
We spoke with packed crowds in overflowing
rooms, just this week.
We're on the ballot in every state.
But that's still not good enough for the
Washington machine.
Last night we learned I won't be featured on
the mainstage at Thursday night's debate.
Why? Silly standards set by the mainstream
media that have been endorsed by the establishment at the RNC.
Should we even be shocked?
They've been trying to silence my message
this whole time.
But I've never given up before, and I'm not
gonna start now. If they want a fight, they've got one.
Will you sign the petition to tell the
Republican Party that you are a libertarian-leaning voter who
opposes the misguided efforts to turn over control of the debates
to the national media and throw us out of the debates?
They need to hear from us, loud and clear:
The liberty movement will not be silenced.
Stand with me today.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Doug Stafford
subject: Can you REALLY TrusTed?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,
Ted Cruz likes to make a big show about how
you can TrusTed.
It's even one of his campaign commercials.
He also likes to make a big show on stage
about supporting Rand Paul's Audit the Fed bill.
But that couldn't be further from the truth
today.
I'm afraid that we cannot "TrusTed" to even
bother to show up for the Senate vote on Audit the Fed.
Today Rand took to the Senate floor and gave
a great speech on Audit the Fed, and then had the first-ever
Senate vote on his bill.
We've been looking towards this day for
years. Everyone with an interest in transparency has been looking
forward to this day.
But where was Ted? Off campaigning.
It seems to be that Ted was not interested in
doing the job he already has. He couldn't even be there for
something as important as Audit the Fed, an issue he claims to
support.

It makes you wonder: what's for show and
what's for real with Ted Cruz?
Where does he really stand??
He ran opposing the Patriot Act -- and then
voted to reauthorize it.
He was also for Obamatrade -- now he's
against it.
He for allowing illegal immigrants staying in
2013 -- now he is vying for the bus driver position on Donald
Trump's deportation express.
This refusal to vote on Audit the Fed is just
another flip flop from Ted Cruz.
I don't know about you, but I am not ready to
TrusTed.
There's too much at stake for someone who
speaks out of both sides of their mouth and doesn't bother to
show up for the fights that matter most.
I know we can count on Rand to be a
consistent voice for liberty. I'm proud to #StandWithRand today
to Audit the Fed and I'll continue to stand with him through Iowa
and beyond.

In Liberty,
Doug Stafford

name: Rand Paul
subject: What you didn't hear tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

"I'm sorry."

That would have been the most fitting start
for President Obama's last State of the Union address tonight.

Sorry for what he's done to our national
debt. Sorry for what he's done to American healthcare for his
failing ObamaCare scheme. Sorry for his ham-handed foreign
policy, which has left America less safe. Sorry for hampering
job growth with higher taxes and draconian regulations, which
cost our economy $2 TRILLION a year.

Patriot, I recorded a brief video in response
to President Obama's address.

After you watch it, I hope you'll agree to
your most generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10, and then
forward this email to at least three of your friends.

Patriot, of course, if we're honest with
ourselves, some members of my own Republican Party have had a big
hand in allowing these failures to continue. Some running for
President now are even pledging to continue parts of the Obama
agenda.

We can't afford this.

We need a President who will balance the
federal budget.

We need a President who will fight to uphold
the entire Bill of Rights, including the Fourth Amendment.

We need a President who will fight for term
limits for Congress.

We need a President who will repeal the
entire tax code and replace it with a fair and flat tax for all
Americans.

We need a President who will keep our country
out of nation-building while ensuring America remains strong,
safe and secure.

We need to Audit the Fed, defend our border
and appoint judges who will roll back years of terrible
decisions.

This is why I'm running for the President and
why I'm taking my message of liberty to Iowa and New Hampshire
this week.

And ithe media is doing whatever they can to
black me out despite my campaign's jaw-dropping grassroots
strength. Don't let them get away with it.

Please make your most generous contribution
during this most critical time.

Please agree to your most generous
contribution of $100, $50, $25 or $10 at once.

And don't forget to send this email to at
least three of your friends right away!

In liberty,
Rand Paul

body:
She won't win without our help. | Friend --

I love Hillary Clinton.

No one's tougher. No one's smarter. No one has a better command of the issues. And, from personal experience, no one's more fun to throw back a cocktail with.

You know that she’s going to make one hell of a president. But the polls are tight in both Iowa and New Hampshire, and she won't win them without our help. **[Chip in $1 today and help make sure we put the best candidate into the White House.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjQ0NTM0NjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIxNDE3MjY0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

If you've paid attention to literally any part of Hillary's career, you know that there are some nasty people out there who are determined to see her fail. Her political opponents know what an effective leader she is, and that's why they've tried to drag her down for years and years.

I don't know anyone else who could have stood up to that kind of opposition for as long as she has, while continuing to fight for all the things she cares about -- and that's why I couldn't be prouder to support her. Our country needs a tough president, and no one's tougher than Hillary.

**Chip in $1, and let’s elect our friend Hillary Clinton as the 45th President of the United States:**

clean_body: She won't win without our help. | Friend -- I love Hillary Clinton. No one's tougher. No one's smarter. No one has a better command of the issues. And, from personal experience, no one's more fun to throw back a cocktail with. You know that she’s going to make one hell of a president. But the polls are tight in both Iowa and New Hampshire, and she won't win them without our help. If you've paid attention to literally any part of Hillary's career, you know that there are some nasty people out there who are determined to see her fail. Her political opponents know what an effective leader she is, and that's why they've tried to drag her down for years and years. I don't know anyone else who could have stood up to that kind of opposition for as long as she has, while continuing to fight for all the things she cares about -- and that's why I couldn't be prouder to support her. Our country needs a tough president, and no one's tougher than Hillary. name: Bernie Sanders 2016
subject: Bernie under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Brothers and Sisters -
Earlier today, Hillary Clinton's campaign unleashed a series of vicious and coordinated attacks against Bernie's universal health care plan. They falsely claimed Bernie's plan would end the Children's Health Insurance Program, dismantle Medicare and strip millions of people of their coverage.
Here is the truth: Bernie's plan would guarantee health care as a right for every man, woman, and child, and it would be implemented in every state in the country regardless of who is governor.
We have made tremendous gains in Iowa, **but if we lost because Hillary Clinton 's campaign scared voters into thinking Bernie's plan would cost them their coverage, it could set our vision for universal health care back at least a generation.**
We simply cannot let that happen.
[**We are SO CLOSE. With Iowa less than three weeks away, your $3 contribution to Bernie 's campaign today could mean the difference between victory and defeat for our campaign.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2bd5/43f17890/44edb804/620f54a6/2196146819/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-under-attack?refcode=em160112healthcare")
**[Contribute $3](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2bd5/43f17890/44edb804/620f54a6/2196146819/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-under-attack?refcode=em160112healthcare")**
I want to close with something important. This campaign isn't about Bernie Sanders and it isn't about Hillary Clinton. It's about the very real issues facing working families across this country. It is a national disgrace that the United States is the only major country in the world that does not offer health care as a right.
We need a president who will fight for the 29 million Americans without health care. That's what this campaign, and your contribution, is about.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
